body:
This PR addresses the next issue from the list https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaAtmos.jl/issues/4285
- renames `precipitation_precomputed_quantities.jl` to `microphysics_cache.jl` 
- moves the `set_diagnostic_edmf_precomputed_quantities_env_precipitation!` and `set_prognostic_edmf_precomputed_quantities_precipitation!` to `microphysics_cache.jl`
- moves updraft tracers sedimentation velocity computations from `set_microphysics_tendency_cache!` to `set_precipitation_velocities!` along with the rest of precipitation velocities computations for microphysics. 

`set_precipitation_velocities` function is not merged with `set_microphysics_tendency_cache`, because we can re-use the same velocity computation logic for no-EDMF and diagnostic-EDMF configurations. 

The velocity computations in `set_precipitation_velocities` are repetetive, but difficult to turn into a more concise loop because of the small differences between microphysics species. I'll think on how to refactor that part.
title: Clean up microphysics cache
